methods.name: Copper/Tin ore
methods.notes: Lumbridge Swamp or Varrock east mine. Drop everything for the fastest XP.

methods.name: Iron ore (power-mine)
methods.notes: Power-mine iron at e.g. Al Kharid or Legacy mine. ~50k+ XP/h at high levels.

methods.name: Normal trees
methods.notes: Drop logs. Early grind, move on to oaks at 15.

methods.name: Willow trees
methods.notes: Draynor Village. Cheap, fast XP all the way to 99.

methods.name: Trout/Salmon (fly fishing)
methods.notes: Barbarian Village / Shilo. Drop fish for max XP.

methods.name: Do Waterfall Quest first (members)
methods.notes: Members quest. Grants 13,750 Attack XP with no skill requirements -> jumps you to about level 30.

methods.name: Slay monsters on Attack stance
methods.notes: F2P-friendly. XP per action varies a lot by monster and gear; the value is a rough guideline.

methods.name: Do Waterfall Quest first (members)
methods.notes: Members quest. Also grants 13,750 Strength XP.

methods.name: Train on aggressive monsters (Aggressive stance)
methods.notes: F2P-friendly. Use the Aggressive attack style. XP per action varies with monster and gear.

methods.name: The Tourist Trap (start)
methods.notes: The Tourist Trap grants 4,650 Fletching + 4,650 Smithing XP.

methods.name: Headless arrows / arrow shafts
methods.notes: XP per action depends on the product; adjust in your own guide data.

questGuides.name: Vampyre Slayer
questGuides.reason: F2P. No requirements. Rewards 4,825 Attack XP -> a quick early Attack boost.

questGuides.name: The Knight's Sword
questGuides.reason: F2P. Rewards 12,725 Smithing XP -> skips you to about Smithing level 29. Needs a little Mining to mine blurite during the quest.

questGuides.name: Waterfall Quest
questGuides.reason: Members. No skill requirements. Rewards 13,750 Attack AND 13,750 Strength XP -> both jump to about level 30. One of the best early combat boosts.

questGuides.name: The Tourist Trap
questGuides.reason: Grants 4,650 XP in both Fletching and Smithing, plus optional Agility/Thieving XP. A great early shortcut.

questGuides.name: Fight Arena
questGuides.reason: 12,175 Attack + 12,175 Thieving XP. A solid combat boost after Waterfall.
